section_miscategorizations.text: The patient denies blood in their stool.
section_miscategorizations.reason: A denial of a symptom is part of the patient-reported review of symptoms/history rather than an exam or test finding.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient is monitoring blood pressure.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This describes the patient's ongoing self-management behavior, which fits better in history/current status than in objective findings.
A patient report of pain is subjective history, not an exam or test finding.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient plans to take a vacation.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is the patient's personal intention rather than a clinician-directed medical plan or instruction.
Current medications belong in the history/current medication state, not in the treatment plan section.
This is an existing medication regimen (current state), not a new or adjusted plan item.
